sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19625" key="batodro/pos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰτοδρόπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19625.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pulling up brambles,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Merc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">190</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
